title: Doff 2-in-1 Ant & Nest Bait Killer | Pre-Baited Stations for Ant Control | Indoor & Outdoor Use | Safe for Pets & Children | Easy to Use
features: DUAL-ACTION FORMULA: This product effectively acts as both bait to attract ants and a powerful formula to kill the nest, ensuring comprehensive control over the infestation.
VERSATILE USE: The bait stations are designed for both indoor and outdoor environments, providing flexible pest management solutions in various spaces.
CHILD AND PET SAFE: When used as instructed, the product is safe around children and pets, giving you peace of mind while using it in your home or garden.
EASY-TO-USE: The easy-to-use bait stations are designed for simple placement in ant-prone areas, making it easier to tackle ant problems without mess or fuss.
EFFECTIVE AGAINST VARIOUS ANT SPECIES: This formula targets multiple ant species, offering effective control for a wide range of ant-related issues, from kitchen invasions to outdoor nests.
